use_cases: Highlight featured products or services with an eye-catching glow effect
Create interactive pricing cards that respond to user cursor movement
Build engaging feature showcases for landing pages
Design premium dashboard widgets with ambient lighting effects
Develop portfolio or showcase cards with dynamic visual feedback
ai_summary: An interactive spotlight card component that creates a dynamic glow effect following the user's cursor position. Features multiple color themes (blue, purple, green, red, orange), size variants, and glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur. The card tracks pointer movement to create an engaging visual effect where the glow emanates from cursor location, making it ideal for premium product showcases, feature highlights, or interactive dashboards.
